name: loan-amount-very-large
rationale: Broker email states loan_amount $12,000,000 against $20,000,000 commercial-style residential property. F1.LA must handle very-large numeric values without overflow / format errors. Expected behavior depends on product policy: (a) accept (Vienna supports any size), (b) flag as outside-policy with size-based threshold, (c) reject. Layer 3 product-design item (validation taxonomy).
notes: Single-event sequence. Tests numeric-format handling at extreme values; pdfSynth uses Number.toLocaleString which handles $12,000,000 cleanly. Phase 4 may surface separate validation thresholds.
